paco.title: PACO Webinar
paco.subtitle: Adaptation Priorities in Central and West Africa
paco.description: Join us for a webinar dedicated to climate change adaptation priorities in Central and West Africa. This event will bring together experts, decision-makers and practitioners to discuss the most urgent adaptation strategies for the region.

emailCheck.title: Register for the webinar
emailCheck.subtitle: Enter your email address to get started
emailCheck.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

login.title: Log in to register
login.subtitle: An account already exists with this email. Log in to access the webinar.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Sign up for the platform and the webinar in one step.
register.error: An error occurred during registration. Please try again.
register.emailUsed: This email is already associated with an account. Try logging in.

activityRegister.title: Register for the webinar
activityRegister.subtitle: Verify your information and register for the PACO webinar.

demographic.recordingConsent: I am informed that this webinar will be recorded and I give my consent to be recorded.

join.title: You are registered!
join.subtitle: You are registered for the PACO webinar. Use the button below to join the Teams meeting on the day of the event.
join.emailError: Error sending the email. Please try again.

success.title: Registration successful!
success.message: Your registration for the PACO webinar is confirmed. An email with the Teams connection link has been sent to you. Please also check your inbox to confirm your account.

gateway.loginSubtitle: Please log in to access the PACO webinar.
gateway.notRegisteredMessage: You must be registered for the PACO webinar to access the meeting.
gateway.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: A verification email has been sent to {email}. Click the link in the email to complete your webinar registration.
verifyEmail.resendError: Error sending email. Please try again.
verifyEmail.checkInbox: Check your inbox and spam folder
verifyEmail.autoFinalizeError: Error finalizing registration. Please try again.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.alreadyRegistered: You are already registered for this webinar.
